  "findings": [
    "Unauthorized on-site water addition to concrete mix (slump manipulation) without engineering approval or verification of water-cement ratio limits."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt concrete placement immediately.",
    "Verify the amount of water added against the maximum allowable water-cement ratio on the delivery ticket.",
    "Perform slump and air content tests on the modified concrete.",
    "Reject the batch if it exceeds the maximum water-cement ratio or specified slump limits."
  ],
  "rationale": "Adding water on-site without strict engineering control and verification violates ACI 301 and ACI 304 standards. It compromises the design compressive strength, increases shrinkage, and reduces the durability of the concrete structure.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301 Specifications for Structural Concrete",
    "ACI 304 Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete"
  ]
}
